bugs.fix: 确认 MTR-2376 缺失属于真实项目多次迁移后的现场数据缺口，不作为通用包兼容逻辑处理；从真实项目备份明确复制 MTR-2376 到 .aida/runs 后，使用修复后的 CLI 重建产物并验证 4 个 run、4 个 context/memory、15 个模块记忆索引一致。

data.content: `aida build` now generates repo-level `.aida/rules/_all.md` alongside tool-specific artifacts and auto-creates missing AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md guide references.
Verified the migration chain end-to-end and aligned rule references so `.aida/rules/_all.md` now exists as the repo-level fallback while tool-specific `_all.md` files remain the primary entrypoint.

Validated bootstrap status/manifest/complete flow plus aggregated aida_task/aida_record/aida_memory behavior against real-project wiring; targeted MCP/init/build/migrate tests and full npm test suite now pass end-to-end.

Release-path validation now includes real built-command execution inside the AIDA repo itself, root-level rules conflict sample verification, MCP bootstrap/task/record/memory handshake, package dry-run, and a slash-module memory-path regression fix proven by real migrate-legacy rerun.
ai-dev-analytics@1.1.10 已通过公共 npm 源在隔离命令环境发布，修复 aida_bootstrap 可用性误判并补充集中授权真实链路验证。

rules.content: 功能必须闭环；若某条功能链路尚未闭环，必须在命令行为或输出中明确告知用户当前边界，不能默认让用户以为已完整支持。

Only enter the AIDA task flow and persist branch/module memory after actual repository changes begin. Do not record pure investigation, solution discussion, ordinary chat, local environment operations, or experiments that do not land in the repository as tasks, context, or memory. Rule-only sedimentation can proceed normally without creating a task.
任何会生成可执行命令、处理冲突、或影响真实工具启动链路的改动，必须补充可运行样本或真实命令验证；禁止只依赖脑内推断、宽松包含断言或“看起来应该可用”的结论。对于 merge、migrate、build、import、MCP 启动命令等链路，至少覆盖一条真实样本回放或实际命令执行验证。
发布或隔离验证应优先隔离命令环境，不得为规避环境污染随意创建 git worktree；执行 git 命令前必须先确认写入范围与副作用，涉及 worktree、branch、index 的操作必须采用最小副作用方案。
处理用户反馈或真实项目异常前，必须先梳理完整流程和业务边界；如果用户提出的修复方向可能不属于通用产品缺陷，必须先说明判断、风险和建议方案并与用户确认，不能直接把一次性现场修复写进通用代码。

highlights.content: `aida build` now generates repo-level `.aida/rules/_all.md` alongside tool-specific artifacts and auto-creates missing AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md guide references.
Verified the migration chain end-to-end and aligned rule references so `.aida/rules/_all.md` now exists as the repo-level fallback while tool-specific `_all.md` files remain the primary entrypoint.

Validated bootstrap status/manifest/complete flow plus aggregated aida_task/aida_record/aida_memory behavior against real-project wiring; targeted MCP/init/build/migrate tests and full npm test suite now pass end-to-end.

Release-path validation now includes real built-command execution inside the AIDA repo itself, root-level rules conflict sample verification, MCP bootstrap/task/record/memory handshake, package dry-run, and a slash-module memory-path regression fix proven by real migrate-legacy rerun.
ai-dev-analytics@1.1.10 已通过公共 npm 源在隔离命令环境发布，修复 aida_bootstrap 可用性误判并补充集中授权真实链路验证。
